description: Visual bar chart with dominant-item highlight, counts, and optional collapsible narrative. Shows category distribution as proportional horizontal bars with click-to-filter support when used inside CardGridRenderer. Supports both static data (Record<string, number> or Array<{key, count}>) and live interactive mode with group data from parent renderers.

category.description: Design token category for bar colors (e.g. 'tactic', 'relationship')

distribution_field.description: Field name in data object containing the distribution (Record<string, number> or Array<{key, count}>)

dominant_field.description: Field name for the dominant/most-frequent item key

narrative_field.description: Field name for the summary narrative text (collapsible)

dominant_label.description: Label shown above the dominant value

severity_value.description: Label for severity badges on bars
